features: Contains Break-up Complex to help fight blackheads from Day 1
The exfoliating micro-beads immediately peel away dead cells to unclog pores
The blackhead fighting ingredients penetrates the pores to help clear them from impurities and prevent blackheads from forming
Oil-free; lifts away dirt and oil
description: Product Description Clean & Clear Blackhead Clearing Daily Scrub contains a active Quick Break-up Complex to help fight blackheads from day 1. The exfoliating micro-beads immediately peel away dead cells to unclog pores. The blackhead fighting ingredient penetrates the pores to help clear them from impurities and prevent blackheads from forming. With soothing actives, this scrub is gentle enough to use everyday to help keep your skin Clean & Clearer of blackheads, without irritating or over-drying. See fewer blackheads after 1 wash. Volume: 150 ml. Ingredients Aqua, Cetyl Alcohol, PPG-15 Stearyl Ether, Polyethylene, Cera Microcristallina, Steareth-21, Salicylic Acid, Polysorbate 60, Panthenol, Chamomilla Recutita Flower Extract, Aloe Barbadensis Gel, Bisabolol, Jojoba Esters, Potassium Cetyl Phosphate, Propylene Glycol, Glucose, Butylene Glycol, Xanthan Gum, Menthyl Lactate, BHT, Parfum, CI77510 Directions Use daily as a face scrub Safety Warning Caution: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep out of reach of children. Box Contains 1x 150 ml Daily Scrub Tube See more
